comment: vercel.json — Deployment config for the Adur & Worthing Bus API backend.
This tells Vercel to run the FastAPI app as a serverless Python function.
1. Install Vercel CLI:  npm i -g vercel
3. Set your BODS API key:  vercel env add BODS_API_KEY
4. Set allowed origin:     vercel env add ALLOWED_ORIGIN
(set to your GitHub Pages URL, e.g. https://yourusername.github.io)
5. Re-deploy after setting env vars: vercel --prod
Alternatively, set env vars in the Vercel dashboard under:
